breweries.description: Filtered directory listing of breweries (by state, city, type, and more).

errors.message: One or more operation inputs are missing or invalid.
errors.user_action: Correct the named input using the operation schema and retry.

by_state.description: US state to filter by, lowercase with underscores.

brewery_type.description: Type: micro, brewpub, regional, large, planning, contract, or closed.

id.description: Brewery id (slug or UUID), usable with the brewery operation.

pagination.behavior: Returns per_page breweries; deeper pages are not mapped.

breweries.when_not_to_use: Do not use this operation for free-text search; use search.
breweries.when_to_use: Use this operation to list breweries for a location, e.g. by_state=california.

brewery.description: Fetch one brewery's full record by id.

query.description: Free-text search over brewery names and cities.

brewery_type.description: Type: micro, brewpub, regional, large, planning, contract, or closed.

id.description: Brewery id (slug or UUID), usable with the brewery operation.

pagination.behavior: Returns per_page matches; deeper pages are not mapped.

search.when_not_to_use: Do not use this operation for structured filters like state or type; use breweries.

constraints: Site permissions, rate limits, and anti-automation rules still apply
human_boundaries: Open Brewery DB is a read-only public dataset; contributions go through GitHub, which is not mapped.
Open Brewery DB is fully public; there are no authenticated surfaces to map.
coverage.website_parity: Mapping mode can inspect the remaining website while direct request recipes are compiled. Browser commands are never counted as runtime parity.

description: Open Brewery DB: search and browse breweries by name, city, state, and type.
